name: Somewhere: Sect of Relic
short_description: Year 1990. Hakan received a squeaky call by his wife. He came around in an her place and tried to find her. Wandering down narrow roads he suddenly understood... It was the place where supernatural had been spilled. And A sect comes to the city.
detailed_description:
Somewhere: Sect of Relic is a horror game that emphasizes first-person survival and problem solving.
Somewhere: Sect of Relic will put players on edge like never before as they explore ominous and mysterious environments, the unknown awaiting them behind every corner.
Somewhere: Sect of Relic is a horrific experience that will grip players from its opening thrills to its chilling denouement.

Year 1990. A small provincial town . Hakan has been watching over the tranquility in the town for many years. One day everything went upside down. Hakan received a squeaky call by his wife. He tried to find his wife. Wandering down narrow roads he suddenly understood... It was the place where supernatural had been spilled. A sect had arrived in the city before him.

What is it? Is it just a nightmare? Or reality? Will he be able to wake up? Will he find to his wife? What is the sect doing here? or Is there another power?

Or all that is true?

English*, Turkish, Russian
*languages with full audio support
